title: Pick the Right @spideriq/mcp-* Package
summary: Decide which @spideriq/mcp-* npm package to install. Use whenever the user asks '@spideriq/mcp vs @spideriq/mcp-publish', 'kitchen-sink vs atomic MCP', 'why is the agent dropping tools?'. Almost always the answer is @spideriq/mcp-publish; the kitchen-sink @spideriq/mcp is only for cross-domain agents.
